title: Password Strength Meter & Secure Login

statement.markdown:
## Projects Challenge: Password Strength Meter & Secure Login

Your objective is to build a fully functional, highly interactive React component representing the target design mockup.

### 🎨 Color Palette
* `#B7D7CD`
* `#C06C88`
* `#411C56`

### 📐 Target Design Mockup
Use the visual mockup shown in the panel to guide your coordinate alignment, container proportions, and spacing.

### 📌 Target Design SVG Source
The target geometry is defined by the following SVG vector graphic (viewable by the LLM judge):
```xml
<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' width='400' height='300'><rect x='20' y='20' rx='10' width='360' height='260' fill='#090a0f'/><rect x='90' y='100' rx='10' width='220' height='120' fill='#B7D7CD'><text x='110' y='120' font-size='14' fill='#C06C88'>Login</text></rect><rect x='20' y='180' rx='10' width='140' height='40' fill='#C06C88'><text x='60' y='200' font-size='14' fill='#white'>Sign in</text></rect><rect x='170' y='180' rx='10' width='140' height='40' fill='#C06C88'><text x='220' y='200' font-size='14' fill='#white'>Register</text></rect><g transform='translate(210, 100)'><rect x='-15' y='0' rx='10' width='40' height='40' fill='#C06C88'/><rect x='5' y='0' rx='10' width='30' height='30' fill='#411C56'/><circle cx='20' cy='20' r='10' fill='#C06C88'/></g></svg>
```

### ⚙️ Requirements
1. Match the visual presentation (layout, alignment, borders, colors) of the mockup.
2. Implement all necessary React state variables, event handlers, and input bindings to make the page interactive.
3. Make sure all interactive controls (buttons, forms, checkboxes, sliders) update the view correctly.

constraints: Must use a password strength meter that updates in real-time
Must implement a secure login system with password hashing and salting
Must have multi-factor authentication options (email and SMS)

referenceAssets.caption: Recreate target design: Password Strength Meter & Secure Login

gradingCriteria.description: Evaluate the real-time password strength meter and its accuracy
Verify the secure login logic implementation, including password hashing and salting
Review the implementation of multi-factor authentication options (email and SMS)
